discovery.name: REQ_BU
discovery.sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT bu.bu_id AS BUID, bu.bu_name AS BUNAME, bu.primary_ledger_id AS LEDGERID FROM fun_all_business_units_v bu WHERE bu.primary_ledger_id IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM por_requisition_headers_all h WHERE h.req_bu_id = bu.bu_id) ORDER BY DECODE(bu.bu_name,'US1 Business Unit',0,1), bu.bu_id) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

discovery.name: REQ_PREPARER
discovery.sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT (SELECT MIN(pea.email_address) FROM per_email_addresses pea WHERE pea.person_id = h.preparer_id AND pea.email_address LIKE '%oraclepdemos.com') AS EMAIL FROM por_requisition_headers_all h WHERE h.preparer_id IS NOT NULL AND h.req_bu_id = (SELECT bu.bu_id FROM fun_all_business_units_v bu WHERE bu.primary_ledger_id IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM por_requisition_headers_all x WHERE x.req_bu_id = bu.bu_id) ORDER BY DECODE(bu.bu_name,'US1 Business Unit',0,1), bu.bu_id FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY) ORDER BY h.creation_date DESC) WHERE EMAIL IS NOT NULL AND ROWNUM = 1

discovery.name: REQ_LINE_REF
discovery.sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT (SELECT loc.location_code FROM hr_locations_all loc WHERE loc.location_id = l.deliver_to_location_id) AS LOC, l.uom_code AS UOM, l.currency_code AS CUR, (SELECT c.category_name FROM egp_categories_vl c WHERE c.category_id = l.category_id) AS CATNAME FROM por_requisition_lines_all l JOIN por_requisition_headers_all h ON h.requisition_header_id = l.requisition_header_id WHERE l.deliver_to_location_id IS NOT NULL AND l.destination_type_code = 'EXPENSE' AND l.uom_code IS NOT NULL AND l.category_id IS NOT NULL AND h.req_bu_id = (SELECT bu.bu_id FROM fun_all_business_units_v bu WHERE bu.primary_ledger_id IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM por_requisition_headers_all x WHERE x.req_bu_id = bu.bu_id) ORDER BY DECODE(bu.bu_name,'US1 Business Unit',0,1), bu.bu_id FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY) ORDER BY l.creation_date DESC) WHERE LOC IS NOT NULL AND CATNAME IS NOT NULL AND ROWNUM = 1

discovery.name: REQ_CHARGE_ACCT
discovery.sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT g.segment1 S1, g.segment2 S2, g.segment3 S3, g.segment4 S4, g.segment5 S5, g.segment6 S6 FROM por_req_distributions_all d JOIN por_requisition_lines_all l ON l.requisition_line_id = d.requisition_line_id JOIN por_requisition_headers_all h ON h.requisition_header_id = l.requisition_header_id JOIN gl_code_combinations g ON g.code_combination_id = d.code_combination_id WHERE g.enabled_flag = 'Y' AND NVL(g.end_date_active, SYSDATE+1) > SYSDATE AND g.detail_posting_allowed_flag = 'Y' AND h.req_bu_id = (SELECT bu.bu_id FROM fun_all_business_units_v bu WHERE bu.primary_ledger_id IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM por_requisition_headers_all x WHERE x.req_bu_id = bu.bu_id) ORDER BY DECODE(bu.bu_name,'US1 Business Unit',0,1), bu.bu_id FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY) ORDER BY d.creation_date DESC) WHERE S3 IS NOT NULL AND ROWNUM = 1

base_read.sql: SELECT requisition_number AS REQUISITION_NUMBER, requisition_header_id AS REQUISITION_HEADER_ID, document_status AS DOCUMENT_STATUS FROM por_requisition_headers_all WHERE requisition_number LIKE :PREFIX || 'RT-REQ-%'

interface_read.sql: SELECT h.requisition_number AS REQUISITION_NUMBER, h.interface_header_key AS INTERFACE_HEADER_KEY, h.process_flag AS PROCESS_FLAG, (SELECT LISTAGG(e.column_name || '=' || e.column_value || ': ' || e.text_line, ' | ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY e.req_import_error_id) FROM por_req_import_errors e JOIN por_req_lines_interface_all l ON l.load_request_id = e.load_request_id AND l.req_line_interface_id = e.interface_id WHERE l.load_request_id = h.load_request_id AND l.interface_header_key = h.interface_header_key) AS ERROR_MESSAGE FROM por_req_headers_interface_all h WHERE h.load_request_id = :LRID
